# Deprecated issue templates

This folder stores retired issue templates that are intentionally not shown in GitHub's issue picker.

- `docs-review.yml` is preserved for historical/context use and is deprecated from active intake.
- Page-specific reports should use `02_docs_page_issue.yml`.
- Active issue intake templates live in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/01_*.yml` through `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/06_*.yml`.
